name: Potato and Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the heavy cream, white wine vinegar, grated onion, salt, and freshly ground pepper.
2. Gradually add the olive oil while stirring until well combined.
3. Add diced potatoes and sliced apples to the dressing.
4. Toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
5. Adjust seasoning if needed and serve at room temperature or chilled.
